assertions.reason: The /persona-packs library now exposes an Import Pack button and dialog. Importing a valid JSON payload redirected to a new pack detail page where both imported proto-personas visibly rendered with the label `Source: json_import`.
evidence: Visible page text on the imported pack detail showed “Proto Persona 1 Source: json_import” and “Proto Persona 2 Source: json_import”.

assertions.reason: A real linked-study cohort is still not reachable from the actual persona-engine user surface for this authenticated user. The imported pack detail variant-review section states “No studies linked to this pack”, while the only visible study navigation remains the demo route `/studies/demo-study/personas`, which still shows 3 accepted demo variants instead of a live generated cohort.
evidence: Visible route text at http://localhost:5180/studies/demo-study/personas showed “Pack: Customer Journey Stress Test Pack · 3 accepted variants visible” with run budget 64.

assertions.reason: The pack detail audit trail now visibly exposes both `Created by` and `Last modified by`. After editing the imported draft pack through the UI, the audit section still displayed the modifier identity, removing the prior browser-surface blocker caused by missing modifier attribution.
evidence: Visible audit-trail text on the pack detail page showed both “Created by …” and “Last modified by …” entries for the imported pack after saving a draft edit.

blockers: Fresh authenticated orgs still have no browser-visible path to a linked real study cohort for pack-detail variant review; visible study navigation only reaches the demo study personas page.
